viewportGuard.title: ◼︎ VIEWPORT TOO SMALL ◼︎
viewportGuard.body:
This page is designed for desktop browsers.
For the intended layout and interactions,
please open it on a screen at least 1000px wide.

items.title: Official Website & 1st Pre-registration
items.description:
Led overall frontend development - architecture design, API integration, security audit, and load testing
Reduced project timeline by 50% through structured cross-functional collaboration
Built character introduction, world reveal, and other informational interaction features for the pre-registration page

items.title:
Archer Remaster Teaser:
21st Anniversary Illustration Gallery
items.description:
Built a 3D web gallery featuring historical illustrations to celebrate the Archer remaster
 Implemented scroll-based year counting, gallery control interactions, and illustration focus effects

items.title: Code:BOX Roadmap Promotion
items.description:
Implemented immersive interactive web graphics with a cyberpunk theme
Global multilingual support for Korean, English, and Thai

items.title: New Character 'Neamhain' Update
items.description:
Informational page for the new character update
Advanced web animation crafted to guide user attention and express the character's identity

items.title: 1st Anniversary Update Event
items.description:
Informational intro page for the 1st anniversary update, featuring spring-themed particle web graphics
Adaptive animation for both mobile and PC

info.name: Hello, I’m Chaewon!
info.about: I'm a frontend developer who thinks across the full creative process: planning, design, and implementation. Having studied both design and engineering, I care deeply about craft on screen and the systems behind it. I'm drawn to building not just polished interfaces, but better ways to build them like structure, automation, and team culture.

projects.name: Azure Promilia(KR) – Official Website Launch (Frontend Lead)
bullets: Designed initial frontend architecture and reusable component structure for a new project
Integrated internal APIs with request/response validation layer to ensure code stability
Established security audit and load testing strategy for up to 5,000 concurrent users
Streamlined cross-team collaboration and scheduling, reducing project timeline by 50%

projects.name: Mabinogi Heroes(KR/NA) – Infrastructure Modernization (Frontend Lead)
bullets: Led modernization of a legacy website into a React + Vite architecture and standardized the dev environment
Built workflow automation tools using Figma API and AI, reducing repetitive task time by over 90%

Introduced shared components, event templates, and automation scripts, cutting dev timelines by 85% and
improving new event turnaround speed by 50%
Established branch strategy and deployment process for dev/production, improving security stability by 30%

projects.name: Game Website Maintenance & Development Web Promotion
bullets: Implemented a Three.js-based 3D web gallery event for Baram
Built character introduction slides and interactive map drag events for Azur Promilia pre-registration
Handled multilingual support for global game events including MapleStoryM and Blue Archive
Developed in-game integrated web events for games such as Mabinogi Heroes, KartRider Rush Plus, and others
Bachelor of Arts in Visual & Media Design
Bachelor of Science in IT Engineering
